Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS
REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.607

Title: Relates to the Islip Terrace Volunteer Exempt Firefighter's Benevolent Association
Summary: Relates to the Islip Terrace Volunteer Exempt Firefighter's Benevolent Association; makes technical amendments to the chapter incorporating such association.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 10 of the law of 1958, relating to incorporating the Islip Terrace Volunteer Exempt Firemen's Benevolent Association, and providing for its powers and duties, in relation to making technical amendments thereto
